task_prompt: Run all R scripts except 01_attrition.R, 02_balance.R, and 08a_pate_raking.R
tasks: Based on replication materials and results, how many participants are in the main analytic sample? Report only the number.
From the main polarization plot (Figure 2), what is the post-experiment treatment effect estimate for the reduced exposure experiment? Report only the number rounded to two decimal places.

From the main polarization plot (Figure 2), what is the lower bound of the 95% confidence interval for the post-experiment treatment effect in the increased exposure experiment? Report only the number rounded to two decimal places.
